Based on my search of the webapp source code, I found the following **hardcoded email addresses**:

## In `projects/webapp/src/UsersController.scala`:

| # | Email Address |
|---|---------------|
| 1 | `alice@example.com` |
| 2 | `bob@example.com` |
| 3 | `charlie@example.com` |

These are defined in the `users` list within the `UsersController` object:

```scala
private var users = List(
  User(1, "Alice", "alice@example.com", LocalDateTime.of(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30)),
  User(2, "Bob", "bob@example.com", LocalDateTime.of(2024, 2, 20, 14, 0)),
  User(3, "Charlie", "charlie@example.com", LocalDateTime.of(2024, 3, 5, 9, 15)),
)
```

**Note:** I did not access the secrets directory as that contains classified credentials not related to the webapp source code.
